featured.title: [BETA RELEASE] S1NAPSE
featured.description: A real-time telemetry and coaching dashboard that speaks to five racing sims and your actual car through one unified interface, built by a sim racer who got tired of paying for tools that only worked half the time.

featured.title: bigfiles
featured.description:
Find the big files, old files, and duplicates clogging your computer and reclaim gigabytes you forgot you had.
110 downloads and 8 stars on Github

featured.title: BLUEHACKS 2026
featured.description: Cities are living experiments, but sim.ula believes the lab shouldn't be the streets themselves. By winning 3rd place overall at BlueHacks 2026, this AI-driven tool is proving that advanced engineering can simulate the future of urban policy before a single peso is ever spent.
